etymology.description: semantic: 髟(髟) (biāo, "hair") + phonetic: 而(而) (ér, "and") = hair -> beard
etymology.interpretation: The character 髵(髵) (ér, "hair, beard") combines the semantic element 髟(髟) (biāo, "hair"), which indicates the general category of hair, with the phonetic element 而(而) (ér, "and") to suggest pronunciation. The combination implies something related to hair, specifically referencing a beard or similar facial hair.
